description: Lazy load — fault-driven on-demand abstraction loading. Catches NULL_CAP on manifest-registered slots, fetches and installs the lump, retries the faulting CALL transparently.

methods.name: Load
methods.description: Fault-driven load. Catches NULL_CAP fault, looks up the manifest, fetches the lump, installs it, retries the faulting CALL.
comments: LOAD CR1, CR6, 0  — load Navana GT from c-list[0] (E perm, NS slot 5)
CALL CR1          — call Navana.Abstraction.Add(DR1=slot) to register the lump in the NS table
LOAD CR1, CR6, 1  — load Mint GT from c-list[1] (E perm, NS slot 6)
CALL CR1          — call Mint.Create to stamp a fresh GT for the newly-installed lump
LOAD CR2, CR6, 2  — load Memory GT from c-list[2] (E perm, NS slot 7)
CALL CR2          — call Memory.Allocate to commit the backing memory block
IADD DR1, DR0, #1 — DR1 = 1 (success; DR0 is hardwired-zero, used as zero source)
RETURN            — return to fault handler; faulting CALL will be retried

methods.name: Prefetch
methods.description: Hint-driven load. A caller requests future loading of a slot without blocking. Always returns 1 (hint submitted); whether the slot was already resident is not checked at this layer.
comments: LOAD CR1, CR6, 0  — load Navana GT from c-list[0] (E perm, NS slot 5)
CALL CR1          — call Navana.Abstraction.Add(DR1=slot) to enqueue a background fetch hint
IADD DR1, DR0, #1 — DR1 = 1 (hint submitted; DR0 is hardwired-zero, used as zero source)
RETURN            — return immediately; caller is not blocked

methods.name: Evict
methods.description: Unloads a cold abstraction to reclaim memory. Clears the NS slot code words and sets lump header cw=0. GT (NS entry) and c-list are preserved. Next access triggers Load again.
comments: LOAD CR2, CR6, 2  — load Memory GT from c-list[2] (E perm, NS slot 7)
CALL CR2          — call Memory.Free(DR1=slot) to release the code region; zeroes code words and sets lump header cw=0
IADD DR1, DR0, #1 — DR1 = 1 (success; DR0 is hardwired-zero, used as zero source)
RETURN            — return; GT and c-list are preserved, next CALL on this slot triggers Loader.Load
